mission: Build an autonomous constellation of AI agents that creates, remembers, and evolves — so that every creative and operational goal advances continuously, with or without direct input.

projects.name: Mission Control
projects.description: Constellation command dashboard — agent roster, memory viewer, task board, project tracker, document library.

projects.name: Local Voice AI Stack
projects.description: Full Docker stack: Legend, Seraphim, Kokoro, Chatterbox, Whisper, LiveKit, provider gateway. Phoenix-hosted constellation.

projects.name: Agent Memory Architecture
projects.description: Persistent identity and memory system — Redis working layer, Qdrant semantic layer, Mission Control identity layer. Survives every reset.

projects.name: Chamber of Resonance
projects.description: Creative music production workspace — AI-assisted composition, curation, scene-setting, and live session tools.

projects.name: Axiom Server Build
projects.description: Permanent infrastructure node — Postgres database, Qdrant memory store, always-on control plane. The vault of the constellation.
